Header.Name: TraceBetweenBones
Header.Keywords: Trace for ground using a middle point between two bones as a start.

Header.Name: TraceFromControl
Header.Description:
Traces from a given control, from its location + Z distance up to its location - Z distance down. 
Looks for FeetIK Trace Channel by default.
